rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. BANKS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 29, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with final leave to amend. Plaintiff's current theory underlying all causes of action (e.g. paragraphs 55, 60) is legally and factually unsupported. Plaintiff shall have 10 day leave to amend to either allege an enforceable contract/promise or allege any other basis for unjust enrichment, quiet title and wrongful foreclosure. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. BANKS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. BANKS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL

rulings.Case Title: CINDY SIU L. LEUNG VS. YONG QIANG KUANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 29, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT YONG QIANG KUANG, XIN YA KUANG, LI HUANG, JUN KUANG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAISY DUARTE VS. NORMA ALMAZAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 29, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFF DAISY DUARTE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)
